stemHtml: How do you determine the position of a significant VFR waypoint for insertion into a Global Navigation Satellite System (GNSS) flight plan?

options.a: By typing in the name of a waypoint on a low altitude route used for IFR flight plans.
options.b: By using bearing and distance from an existing significant point or insertion of coordinates.
options.c: By using the name of a conspicuous city in the vicinity of the route and bearing and distance from there.
options.d: By inserting the coordinates of the reference point of an aerodrome and bearing and distance to the significant VFR point.
